LoL Division 2014-04-11 }}{{TOCRWI}} The '''INVADERS''' brand was brought to life in January 2014 by Jon "'''JonB'''" Blayney and Kyle "'''eLykze'''" Ellis with the intention of being different to traditional eSport organizations. Since '''INVADERS''' conception the brand have worked seamlessly behind the scenes developing the brand and as of April 2014 the brand acquired their first acquisition; ex [[mYinsanity]] league of legends lineup who at the time were playing under the Free Agents banner. == History == == Timeline == {{TeamNews}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {{TeamMembersFormer}} == Organization == {|class="sortable wikitable" ! !ID !Name !Position {{listplayersp|JonB|gb|Jon Blayney |'''Owner'''}} {{listplayersp|eLykze|gb|Kyle Ellis |'''Owner'''}} {{listplayersp|Flipm0de|bg|Krasimir Kolev|'''Manager'''}} {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} ===Former=== {{listplayer/Start|newteam=yes|staff=yes}} {{listplayer|PAL|de|Philip Leber|'''Coach'''|newteam=GAL}} {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} == Highlight Videos == ==Interviews== ==See Also== ==External Links== ==References==
